title: NVIDIA Kubernetes Device Plugin
description: NVIDIA Kubernetes Device Plugin documents installation material for NVIDIA Device Plugin in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the cluster-addon class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights nvidia. com/gpu 자원, and 설치, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include nvidia, kubernetes, device plugin, nvidia-device-plugin, and nvidia kubernetes device plugin, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / device / nvidia-device-plugin / install, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
